title: Upon Her Feet
content:
Her pretty feet
Like snails did creep
A little out, and then,
As if they played at Bo-peep,
Did soon draw in again.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Her Feet"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
